private_key_env.pem_type: EC P-256 (ES256) — must load with cryptography load_pem_private_key

normalization: live_first_20_operator._coinbase_pem_ok replaces \\n with newline before parse

diagnostics_map.pem_parse_failed: Exception from load_pem_private_key — wrong curve, corrupt PEM, wrong escapes
diagnostics_map.rest_error_with_401: JWT or key mismatch — CoinbaseAuthError or HTTP 401 in response
diagnostics_map.rest_error_other: HTTP 403/429/5xx — permissions, rate limit, server error
